title: Automation: when a status changes create a group in another board
excerpt: When in a project approval board, when I change the status to approved, I want to automatically create a new group in a risk board with the name of the project I just approved. Is this possible?

posts.author: OzBrewer (OzBrewer)
posts.cookedHtml: When in a project approval board, when I change the status to approved, I want to automatically create a new group in a risk board with the name of the project I just approved. Is this possible?

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @OzBrewer

Unfortunately this cannot be done natively, API does not allow to create a group in another board yet either.

There is a recipe where you can create a new board once a project has been approved.

You could then mirror across the information required into the risk management board through connected boards.

I hope this help.

Yours Sincerely,
Cleopatra Luneburg
Client Success Manager
upstream

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @OzBrewer,

Yes, it is possible. You can create a template in the Duplicate and Uniques app which creates a new group in your preferred board and then run that template using the integration below.

If you need any need, you can always write to us at support@kolaai.com
